weightedAvgTerDesc: The average cost of your portfolio, weighted by ETF allocation.
totalAssetsDesc: The total number of unique underlying companies or assets across all ETFs.
activeEtfsDesc: The number of ETFs currently allocated with a weight > 0%.
etfAllocationInfo: A macro-level breakdown of the weights you assigned to each individual ETF in your portfolio.
sectorExposureInfo: The industry breakdown (e.g., Technology, Healthcare) of the underlying companies in your portfolio.
geoExposureInfo: A breakdown of the physical country locations of the underlying companies in your portfolio.
currencyExposureInfo: Your risk exposure to different foreign exchange currencies based on the trading currency of your underlying assets.
